prompt:
A clear view of a small breeding-ready guppy group in an aquarium: three larger, rounder-bodied female guppies and one smaller, more colorful male guppy swimming together near mid-water. The fish are distinct in size and shape to make the “three females and one male” composition visually unambiguous, with a simple planted background and calm water.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk aquarium aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean water clarity, no logos, no readable text, and no human faces. Keep the four fish grouped and centered so it reads clearly as an inventory icon.
